reviews.review_description: It was a wonderful app but it stopped working on my oculus go. I can't download/start any meditation
Having issue on oculus not being able to download anything or use the app, all permissions set but not working
I’ve downloaded this app twice and it’s not opening any of the meditations.

reviews.review_title: Effective and offers a variety of places
reviews.review_description:
I meditate in the real world and I subscribed to Headspace for more than a year and I also tried Calm app for a few days. But the Guided Meditation app is better than the other app I've tried and, in the long run, it makes buying an Oculus Go with this app installed much cheaper than the yearly subscription of the other apps. 

It is highly customisable so I can choose my virtual space (Ripple Island Sunset is the best), music, and package (they have a lot but so far, the packages on Focus, Heartfulness, and Relaxation reduced my stress level and helped me achieve its goals). 

I bought an Oculus Go for my husband so he can enjoy the benefit of guided meditation and he is totally into it! 

The only downside, and perhaps it cannot be changed, is that the Sleep meditation helps you sleep, so again it works,  but when the meditation is over, it wakes you up with a jolt with that usual beep asking if you want to go back to the main menu or remain in the environment. But one must turn the headset off and properly go to sleep so this is not a criticism but rather a request: please make the sound softer and the screen light dimmer for the sleep meditation. 

Thank you for creating this and sharing this wonderful meditation practice with us.

PS: I have no idea why this app doesn't get at least a 4.5 star! Aside from the sometimes long (but worth it) download time for some packages, this app is perfect!

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your kind words and feedback!❤️

Great idea on enhancing the sleep series differently so we don't bring you out of your calm state. We've added this insight to our enhancement list.

Happy meditating!

reviews.review_description:
After installing , a nice 360 background appears and you should select one enviroment , another downloadind begins , after a while , app starts and suddenly it stops !  And you should close the app.
Where are you dear developer ??
Why wont it install?

The series on depression is amazing. Tip for others: if you click on customize, you choose an environment, a topic, and music. I’m currently working my way through the ten-part depression series, but there’s so much content. 

It CAN be a little tedious downloading every section, BUT IT IS ALL FREE. How is this possible? It feels too good to be true. I’d easily pay $10 or more for this.

developer_response.body:
Thank you! We've so happy you're enjoying the app.

Please keep an eye out next week for the launch of an amazing set of new 5k environments!

reviews.review_description: I’m in Love! This is a twice a day experience for me, sometimes more. Can’t believe it’s free. I wanted to get VR for meditation and I’m so happy I found this app. This app is so Gorgeous and customizable. Just positive vibes. It would be nice to be able to name my custom meditations and save them.

developer_response.body:
We're so grateful for your kind words and useful feedback! :D

Our team can't wait to share some of the fun new meditation and environment content releasing next month. Hope you enjoy!

reviews.review_description: I will give 5 Stars, when a German Voice is added.

reviews.review_title: I want to rate it higher.
reviews.review_description: My internet speed isn't so great and having to download every aspect of the meditation takes too long. I wish there was a way to download all the scenes and tracks at once. Also, perhaps this is a newbie question, but I cannot see a way to lay in bed and meditate. I see no way to reposition the screen. Add these features and I would give it a higher rating.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your ideas!

Our next update will allow you to reposition the screen when laying down. :)

An average download is under 20 seconds, so if you're seeing anything greater please contact us at gmvr@cubicleninjas.com. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: I love how there are so many different options to customize your daily meditation.   Good sound and picture quality.  Lots of beautiful environments to choose from - my favorite is the arctic landscape with the northern stars.   The sound of the arctic wind and snow falling on my face makes the experience very immersive. This app makes me look forward to my daily meditation.

This is an amazing app!
The title is a little misleading as it can be completely tailored to your own needs, without any commentary or music. Graphics are amazing, fully imersive, love it!

developer_response.body: Thank you! We just pushed a big update tonight with new 5k environments and features we hope you love just as much. Happy meditating!

reviews.review_description: Brilliant app with tons of content and great customisation. My only issue is that my Oculus Go keeps switching off before the end of the meditation so I never get to complete a full 10 mins. I've tried altering the power settings to keep the device powered on but the problem persists. I see other reviewers have had the same issue so maybe there can be a "keep device awake" solution in the next update.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much! ❤️

Looking into the "keep device awake" issue right now to fix in a future update.

Happy meditating!

reviews.review_description:
Edit: 1/27/21 Like others, I have upgraded to the Quest 2 and am crushed to not have this. Quest 2 Tai Chi comes close with similar environments but if you make it available for Quest 2 it would basically be what I was requesting before! More HD scenes, walking around. Maybe some interaction with environment?

ORIGINAL: This app was one of my first VR experiences and I have been using it daily ever since for anxiety, insomnia, and chronic pain (so versatile!). 

If you can add more 5k scenes and maybe a paid version to walk around my life would be even better! I would gladly pay a great deal of money and deal with large files to have more 5k environments (especially with time of day change! I love Mt Huntington 2) and even the ability to move around even a little bit! Seriously,  this app is what is keeping me sane through severe health issues !

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much! ❤️ 

Looking into the "keep device awake" issue right now to fix in a future update. 

Happy meditating!

reviews.review_description: I love this app. The sense of beauty that the artists have created in the numerous scenes are fantastic. Everything for meditation well thought out, eg the option to shift your viewing vantage point when it recognises that you are lying flat, timing options , naration options , music options levels on or off etc. Easy to customise to your taste. All in all an excellent app.

Great app however the scary cave is to tense and not very relaxed. I think a starry night would be less scary/creepy for a night time before bed meditation it’s a shame as the others are brighter so not as good for before sleep. The others are lovely.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback!

Would you be open to contacting us at gmvr@cubicleninjas.com to discuss potential ideas on how to improve the sleep option? We agree that many environments may not be ideal, so with a brief discussion we could identify how best to refine this for you moving forward. Thanks!

reviews.review_title: Is the best And it’s free
reviews.review_description: It guides me is really relaxing gorgeous really immersive, best training very well polished app on my Oculus Go Super Happy

developer_response.body:
Your review makes us super happy – thank you!

We have 30 new 5k stereo environments and some amazing new meditation series launching next month. Hope you enjoy them!

reviews.review_description:
If everyone in our world listened to one of these every day, it would be a much better place.

I have only used this a handful of times and has given me so much peace and relaxation. The graphics are probably some of the best on Oculus Go as well. Just get comfortable and turn it on, you won’t regret it.

I work a job with high turnover due to wages vs stress and personal risk. This app has helped me perform better at work, as well as handle the stress better. 

A large variety of scenery, music and guidance tracks to choose from, with unguided meditation also available. Simple to use as well.
I will keep my VR gear just because of this app. I don't play games but I do meditate and this app is awesome.
